loading.timeout_error: Initialization timeout. Please restart the application.

debugBadge.title: Debug mode is on
debugBadge.description: Local logs are more detailed and can grow faster.
debugBadge.restartHint: Turn it off and restart the app or daemon to fully return to normal logging.
debugBadge.disabledToast: Debug mode turned off. Restart to fully return to normal logging.
debugBadge.disableFailed: Failed to turn off Debug mode

update.title: Update available
update.readyHint: Update downloaded. Click Install now to apply and restart.
update.noUpdate: You're already on the latest version.
update.downloadFailed: Background download failed. Please try again.

packageManager.title: Please upgrade via your package manager
packageManager.portableTitle: Please download the new portable version
packageManager.debHint: UniClipboard was installed via apt (Debian/Ubuntu). Run this in a terminal to upgrade:
packageManager.rpmHint: UniClipboard was installed via dnf/yum (Fedora/RHEL). Run this in a terminal to upgrade:
packageManager.portableHint: You're running the portable build. It doesn't update in place — download the new portable zip from the release page and replace the executable (your data folder stays untouched).
packageManager.debCommand: sudo apt update && sudo apt install --only-upgrade uniclipboard

window.title: A new version of UniClipboard is available!
window.subtitle: {{app}} {{version}} is now available—you have {{currentVersion}}. Would you like to download it now?
window.readySubtitle: {{app}} {{version}} has been downloaded and is ready to install.
window.autoUpdate: Automatically download updates in the future
window.upToDateBody: You're already running the latest version of UniClipboard.

upgradeNotice.title: Re-pair your devices
upgradeNotice.body: This version updates the device pairing scheme. Your previous pairings can no longer sync. Please open Devices to invite or re-join the other device.
upgradeNotice.gotIt: Got it, don't remind me again

restartBanner.errorMessage: Automatic restart failed. Please quit the app manually and reopen it to apply the change.

deviceName.label: Device Name
deviceName.description: Used to identify this device on the local network

autoStart.label: Launch at startup
autoStart.description: Start Uniclipboard when the system boots

silentStart.label: Silent start
silentStart.description: Run in background without showing the main window

diagnostics.label: Send diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Send crashes, errors, and anonymous logs. Clipboard content is never collected.

usageAnalytics.label: Send usage analytics
usageAnalytics.description: Send anonymous feature usage statistics to improve the product. Clipboard content is never collected.

notice.title: Help improve UniClipboard
notice.body: UniClipboard collects anonymous diagnostics and usage data to help improve the app. Your clipboard content is never collected or transmitted. You can change these choices anytime in Settings > General > Privacy.

logsDirectory.title: Logs
logsDirectory.label: Log directory
logsDirectory.description: Open the folder where application logs are stored

debug.label: Debug mode
debug.description: Increase local diagnostic log detail after the app and daemon are restarted.
debug.confirmDescription: Debug mode increases local log volume and may include more runtime context. Clipboard content should still not be actively logged. Confirming will immediately restart the app and daemon to apply the change. Turn it off when no longer needed and restart the app or daemon to return fully to normal logging.
debug.restartToast: Restart the app or daemon for the logging change to fully take effect.
debug.restartingDescription: Restarting the app and background daemon to apply Debug mode. Please wait and do not close this window.

export.label: Export logs
export.description: Create a zip archive with GUI, daemon, and CLI logs from the last 24 hours in Downloads.

zoom.title: Interface Scale
zoom.description: Scale applies to both the main window and quick panel, and stays in sync with the shortcuts.

autoSync.label: Auto sync
autoSync.description: Control clipboard sync across all devices. When disabled, no content will be synced to any device.

syncOnRestore.label: Sync on restore
syncOnRestore.description: When you restore a past clipboard entry, make it the active clipboard on your other devices too. Off by default.

syncFrequency.label: Sync frequency
syncFrequency.description: Control how often uniClipboard checks for new content

maxFileSize.label: Max file size
maxFileSize.description: Limit the maximum size of a single file to sync

enable.label: Enable file sync
enable.description: Sync copied files between devices over LAN

smallFileThreshold.label: Immediate transfer threshold
smallFileThreshold.description: Files smaller than this are transferred immediately; larger files sync metadata only

errors.exceedsMax: Must be less than max file size

maxFileSize.label: Maximum file size
maxFileSize.description: Files larger than this will not be synced

errors.range: Must be between 1 and 10240 MB (10 GB)

cacheQuota.label: Per-device cache quota
cacheQuota.description: Maximum disk space for cached files from each device

retentionPeriod.label: File retention period
retentionPeriod.description: Cached files are removed after this duration

errors.range: Must be between 1 and 720 hours (30 days)

autoCleanup.label: Auto-cleanup
autoCleanup.description: Automatically remove expired cached files on startup

endToEndEncryption.label: End-to-end encryption
endToEndEncryption.description: Enable end-to-end encryption for all synced content

encryptionPassword.label: Encryption password
encryptionPassword.description: Used to encrypt and decrypt data

autoUnlock.label: Auto unlock
autoUnlock.description: Automatically unlock from keychain on startup

lanOnly.label: LAN-only Mode
lanOnly.description: Disable public-relay fallback. Devices sync only over the same local network. Takes effect after restart.
lanOnly.infoIconAriaLabel: View the list of requests that still reach the internet when LAN-only Mode is on
lanOnly.saveError: Save failed: {{message}}. Reverted to the previous setting.

disclosure.title: Requests that still reach the internet with LAN-only Mode on
disclosure.intro: The following 4 request types are controlled by independent modules and are not affected by LAN-only Mode:

rendezvous.title: First-pairing rendezvous
rendezvous.description: Pairing a new device still requires reaching rendezvous.uniclipboard.app to exchange NodeIds. Once paired, day-to-day sync no longer uses rendezvous.

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.description: Telemetry is controlled independently by General → Telemetry, not by LAN-only Mode. To disable it, go to the General section.

pkarr.title: pkarr DHT NodeId resolution
pkarr.description: Cross-subnet connections resolve peer NodeIds via the public pkarr DHT, similar in nature to DNS. Disabling it would drop cross-subnet connection rate from ~90% to near zero.

autoUpdate.title: Auto-update GitHub check
autoUpdate.description: Controlled independently by General → Auto-update, which queries the GitHub Release API for new versions.

allowOverlayAddrs.label: Allow overlay network addresses
allowOverlayAddrs.description: Off by default. Enable when both peers share the same VPN (e.g. Tailscale) so connections can use that overlay network. Takes effect after restart.
allowOverlayAddrs.infoIconAriaLabel: Learn what overlay network addresses are and when to enable this option
allowOverlayAddrs.saveError: Save failed: {{message}}. Reverted to the previous setting.

disclosure.title: About overlay network addresses
disclosure.intro: When establishing direct connections, your machine has multiple IP addresses (real LAN, VPN tunnels, etc.). "Overlay network addresses" refers to virtual NIC IPs created by VPN software:

covered.title: What this affects
covered.description: Specifically the CGNAT range 100.64.0.0/10 (Tailscale's default IPv4) and the Tailscale IPv6 ULA fd7a:115c:a1e0::/48. Clash fake-ip (198.18.0.0/15) and link-local (169.254.0.0/16) are always filtered regardless of this setting.

whyOff.title: Why off by default
whyOff.description: When two peers are not in the same VPN, publishing virtual-NIC IPs as connection candidates wastes path-validation budget on dead candidates and slows the real direct connection.

whenOn.title: When to turn on
whenOn.description: Turn on if both peers are in the same Tailscale tailnet (or another shared overlay) and direct LAN/Internet paths are blocked, but the overlay route works. iroh will then use the overlay path as a connection candidate.

tradeoff.title: Trade-off
tradeoff.description: If only one peer has the VPN — or peers are in different tailnets — turning this on makes connections slower but doesn't outright break them (relay fallback still works). If unsure, leave it off.

customRelays.label: Custom relay nodes
customRelays.description: Add one or more iroh relay URLs. Leave empty to use the default relays. LAN-only Mode preserves this list but does not use it. Takes effect after restart.
customRelays.saveError: Failed to save custom relays: {{message}}. Reverted to the previous setting.
customRelays.invalidUrl: Invalid relay URL: {{url}}. Enter an http or https URL.

testErrors.unavailable: Relay testing is not available in this runtime.

congestionController.label: Congestion controller
congestionController.description: Algorithm for network flow control. CUBIC works best on local and well-provisioned networks; BBR3 may perform better on long-distance or lossy links. Takes effect after restart.

restartBanner.message: Network settings changed. A background service restart is needed to apply.
restartBanner.errorMessage: Background service restart failed. Please retry or restart the app manually.

storage.title: Storage

autoClearHistory.label: Auto-clear history
autoClearHistory.description: Automatically clean up old clipboard entries based on retention rules

historyRetention.label: History retention
historyRetention.description: Maximum retention time for clipboard history

maxHistoryItems.label: Max history items
maxHistoryItems.description: Maximum number of clipboard entries to keep

skipPinned.label: Skip pinned items
skipPinned.description: Pinned items are excluded from automatic cleanup

clearHistory.label: Clear history
clearHistory.description: Delete all clipboard history and free up storage space
clearHistory.confirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
clearHistory.dialogDescription: This will delete all clipboard history and cannot be undone.

clearCache.label: Clear cache
clearCache.description: Remove cached thumbnails and temporary files

dataDirectory.label: Data directory
dataDirectory.description: Open the folder where application data is stored

export.label: Export config
export.description: Pack all of your config, history, and device identity into one encrypted file to move to another computer. It's protected by your Space passphrase — no extra password needed
export.lockedError: Unlock first, then export the config

import.label: Import config
import.description: Restore config from an exported file. This is a device move: this machine becomes that exported device, replacing whatever is here now
import.passwordDescription: Enter the Space passphrase of the device this file was exported from — that's what unlocks it.
import.passwordPlaceholder: Space passphrase of the exported device
import.confirmTitle: Confirm import: this is a device move
import.confirmDescription: Importing makes this machine join under the exported device's identity and replaces the config currently on it. Review carefully — this cannot be undone.
import.warningMove: This machine will become that exported device, taking over its identity and pairings.
import.warningNoDualOnline: After this, do not bring the original device back online. Two devices sharing one identity online will conflict with each other on the device network.
import.warningReplace: Any config and history currently on this machine will be replaced by the imported one. If this machine is already in use, make sure there's nothing on it you want to keep.
import.restartingDescription: Please wait — the app will restart and apply the imported config. Do not close it.
import.restartingUnlockHint: After the restart you'll need to enter your Space passphrase to unlock.
import.invalidPasswordError: Wrong passphrase, or the file is corrupted
import.incompatibleError: This config bundle's version is not compatible with the current app

searchIndex.label: Search index
searchIndex.statusDescription: Current state of the full-text search index
searchIndex.lastRebuiltDescription: Time of the last successful index rebuild
searchIndex.rebuildDescription: Manually trigger a full rebuild of the search index

storage.placeholder: Storage settings are not yet available.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts

issues.sameLayer: Same key used in another scope on this layer: {{key}}
issues.shadowedByHigher: Will be shadowed when a higher layer is active: {{key}}
issues.shadowsLower: Will shadow shortcuts on lower layers: {{key}}

shortcuts.chordHint: Press another combo for a second step (press the same combo twice for a "double tap"), or confirm

quickPanel.title: Quick Panel

enable.label: Enable quick panel
enable.description: Registers a global shortcut and creates the quick panel window in the background. Disabling unregisters the shortcut immediately.

position.label: Position
position.description: Choose where the quick panel appears when you press the shortcut.

quickPanel.restartHint: Quick panel is now off. Restart the app to fully release the background processes.

autoCheckUpdate.label: Auto-check for updates
autoCheckUpdate.description: Automatically check for new versions when the app starts

autoDownloadUpdate.label: Download updates in background
autoDownloadUpdate.description: Pre-fetch the installer when a new version is detected, so installing is instant.

updateChannel.label: Update Channel
updateChannel.description: Choose which release channel to receive updates from

alphaWarning.title: Switch to Alpha?
alphaWarning.description: Alpha builds may include features and regressions that have not been fully validated. UniClipboard will check the alpha channel immediately after switching.

unlock.title: Unlock UniClipboard
unlock.description: Your data is encrypted. Please unlock to continue.
unlock.macOSNote: On macOS, you can choose "Always Allow" in the keychain prompt to enable seamless auto-unlock.

keychainModal.title: Grant Keychain Access
keychainModal.description: To enable auto-unlock, UniClipboard needs permanent access to your macOS Keychain.
keychainModal.step1: A macOS Keychain access prompt will appear
keychainModal.step3: Enter your macOS password to confirm
keychainModal.note: This is a macOS system dialog, not part of UniClipboard.
keychainModal.error: Keychain Always Allow permission not detected. Please try again and make sure to select "Always Allow" in the macOS Keychain prompt.

passphraseModal.title: Enter your space passphrase
passphraseModal.description: Auto-unlock could not retrieve the key from the keychain. Enter the passphrase you set for this space to unlock manually.
passphraseModal.hint: After unlocking once, the keychain will be refreshed so future sessions can auto-unlock again.

errors.corruptedKeyMaterial: The local key material is corrupted. You'll need to reset this space and re-join from another device to recover.
errors.setupNotCompleted: Setup is not complete on this device yet. Please run setup first.
errors.spaceNotInitialized: No space exists on this device. Please initialize a new space or join from another device.
errors.facadeUnavailable: The app is still starting up. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.internal: Unlock failed unexpectedly. Please try again or restart the application.

factoryReset.link: Forgot your passphrase? Reset and start over

modal.title: Reset and start over
modal.warning: Once reset, the encrypted clipboard history stored on this device cannot be recovered.
modal.recovery: If you have another paired device, you can re-invite this device from it and the history will sync back from the peer.

errors.keyMaterialWipeFailed: Failed to wipe key material; reset did not complete. Please try again or restart the application.
errors.storageFailed: Key material was cleared but the status could not be saved. Please restart the application to finish resetting.
errors.facadeUnavailable: The app is still starting up. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.internal: Reset failed unexpectedly. Please try again or restart the application.

logs.startingBackendListener: Starting backend clipboard new content listener...
logs.backendListenerStarted: Backend clipboard new content listener started
logs.listeningToClipboardEvents: Starting to listen for clipboard new content events...
logs.ignoringDuplicateEvent: Ignoring duplicate events within short time
logs.listenerAlreadyActive: Listener is already active, skipping setup

search.noResultsFiltered: No items match the current filters

content.emptyDescription: When you copy content, it will appear here.
content.emptyHint: Try copying some text or images!

errors.fileLocationUnavailable: This file is no longer available locally.
errors.unavailableTooltip: This content is no longer available (bytes lost). Cannot paste. Consider deleting it from history.
errors.fileSourceMissing: The source file is no longer at its original location — it may have been deleted or moved. Restore it to retry.

cancelReason.remote_peer: The other side cancelled this transfer
cancelReason.timeout: Transfer timed out and was cancelled

clipboard.confirmDeleteDescription_one: Are you sure you want to delete the selected item? This action cannot be undone.
clipboard.confirmDeleteDescription_other: Are you sure you want to delete the {{count}} selected items? This action cannot be undone.

addDevice.title: Invite a new device
addDevice.subtitle: Enter this code on the joining device
addDevice.passphraseHint: The joining device also needs the space passphrase to finish pairing

errors.issueFailed: Failed to generate invitation. Please try again.

success.title: Device joined
success.subtitle: The other device has successfully joined this space

reasons.timeout: Timed out — the other device didn't complete pairing in time
reasons.passphrase_mismatch: The other device entered the wrong passphrase

unpair.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to unpair {{deviceName}}? You will need to pair again to sync clipboard content.

tooltip.lan: Sent over a direct IP path, which may be local network or a VPN such as Tailscale.
tooltip.relay: Sent through an encrypted relay server. Content is encrypted, but connection info is visible to the relay.
tooltip.unknown: Detecting how this device is reachable.
tooltip.outOfLan: Local-network-only sync is on, but this device isn't on the same network. It will reconnect once back on the same network.

syncPaused.message: Clipboard sync is paused. All devices are currently not syncing.

mobileSync.title: Mobile Sync
mobileSync.description: Sync your clipboard with mobile devices (iOS / Android) over LAN using the SyncClipboard protocol

enableConfirm.title: Enable mobile sync
enableConfirm.body: Mobile sync will turn on and start listening on port {{port}} over LAN HTTP. Use only on trusted networks — anyone on the same LAN with the credentials can read/write this clipboard.

settingsSheet.title: Mobile sync configuration
settingsSheet.description: Adjust the switches and network parameters that let mobile devices reach this machine over LAN

enabled.label: Enable mobile sync
enabled.description: When off, all sync requests from mobile devices are immediately rejected

lanListener.label: LAN listener
lanListener.description: Listens for cleartext HTTP on the chosen network interface; required to receive mobile requests

auto.label: Auto
auto.hint: Daemon listens on all interfaces. Copy the one your mobile device can reach.

bindIp.label: Bind IP
bindIp.empty: No usable LAN IPv4 addresses detected

warning.title: Network exposure warning
warning.body: Anyone on this LAN can read or write your clipboard once they obtain this machine's URL and a paired credential. Only enable on trusted Wi-Fi.

lanListener.disabledHint: Enable the LAN listener before adding a device

add.title: Add device
add.subtitle: Generate a long-lived credential pair. The same pair works on iOS Shortcut and any Android client that speaks the SyncClipboard protocol.

advanced.title: Advanced options
advanced.description: Leave empty to auto-generate a random credential pair

username.label: Custom username
username.help: 6–32 chars, must start with a letter, only A-Z a-z 0-9 _

password.label: Custom password
password.help: At least 8 chars; no complexity requirement

credential.title: Scan to connect {{label}}
credential.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your phone to finish mobile sync setup

pair.qrAlt: QR code that auto-fills the sync credentials
pair.connectHint: Scan with your phone to pair
pair.wifiHint: Pick the address on the same Wi-Fi as your phone

ios.scanQrAlt: QR code for the TestFlight invite link
ios.shortcutFallback: Don't want the App? Scan to install the Shortcut as fallback
ios.shortcutQrAlt: QR code to install the iOS shortcut

android.scanQrAlt: QR code for the GitHub Releases APK download page

revoke.confirmDescription: Once revoked, this device can no longer sync. To reconnect you must add it again (the password cannot be recovered).

username.label: Username
username.help: 6-32 chars, must start with a letter, only A-Z a-z 0-9 _
username.renameNotice: Changing the username generates a new password and requires re-pairing the device.

password.label: Password
password.placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current password
password.autoPlaceholder: A new password will be generated
password.help: Leave blank to keep it unchanged. Enter a new password (at least 8 characters) to replace it.
password.autoHelp: A new password will be generated and shown once after saving.

result.warning: These credentials are shown only once. Save them before closing this dialog.
result.warningReissued: The old password no longer works. The mobile client must use this new password to keep syncing. These credentials are shown only once — save them before closing this dialog.

dialog.title: Change password for {{label}}
dialog.subtitle: The server only stores a password hash, so the current one cannot be shown. After rotating, update the password field in your mobile client.
dialog.passwordHelp: Empty → auto-generated strong password. Custom must be 8–256 chars.
dialog.warning: The old password is invalidated immediately. The mobile client won't sync until its password field is updated.

result.title: New password generated
result.subtitle: Here is the new password — shown only this once. Copy it now and paste it into the password field of your mobile client.
result.warning: The old password no longer works. The mobile client must use this new password to keep syncing.
result.confirmSaved: I have saved the new password
result.closeBlocked: Confirm "I have saved the new password" first

deviceDialog.qrPlaceholder: The server only stores a password hash, so the QR code can't be re-generated. Click "Change password" to mint a new one and scan it here.

errors.facadeUnavailable: Mobile sync is not enabled in this build
errors.labelTooLong: Device label is too long (max {{max}} chars)
errors.usernameTooShort: Username is too short (min {{min}} chars, got {{got}})
errors.usernameTooLong: Username is too long (max {{max}} chars, got {{got}})
errors.usernameMustStartWithLetter: Username must start with an ASCII letter
errors.usernameContainsForbiddenChars: Username may only contain letters, digits, and underscore
errors.deviceNotFound: Device no longer exists; please refresh the list
errors.endpointInfoFailed: Failed to probe current LAN address: {{message}}
errors.noLanInterfaceAvailable: No usable LAN IPv4 address detected. Connect to a LAN, or pick a specific address under Configure → Bind IP, then try again.

badges.experimentalTooltip: This feature is experimental — its behavior may change or be unstable in future releases.

sendEnabled.title: Send to this device
sendEnabled.description: When on, clipboard content from this computer is sent to the selected device. Receiving is always on for now; a dedicated receive toggle will arrive in a later release.

syncImage.title: Sync Images
syncImage.description: Allow syncing image content (may use more bandwidth)

syncRichText.title: Sync Rich Text
syncRichText.description: Allow syncing rich text content (HTML, RTF)

switchSpace.title: Switch to another space
switchSpace.subtitle: Existing clipboard history will be re-encrypted under the new master key.
switchSpace.warning: All local clipboard data is re-encrypted in 4 phases. Don't quit the app until it finishes — a crash mid-flight will auto-resume on next launch.

success.title: Switched space
success.subtitle_one: Migrated 1 clipboard record under the new master key.
success.subtitle_other: Migrated {{count}} clipboard records under the new master key.

reasons.not_setup: This device hasn't completed first-time setup. Use "Initialize" or "Join" first.
reasons.pending_migration: A previous migration is still in flight. Restart the app to auto-resume.
reasons.not_unlocked: Space session is locked. Restart the app so the keychain re-unlocks it.
reasons.sponsor_rejected: Sponsor did not recognise the invitation code. Ask them to issue a fresh one.
reasons.invitation_not_found: Invitation code has already been used or is no longer valid. Ask the sponsor to issue a fresh one.
reasons.invitation_expired: Invitation expired. Ask the sponsor to issue a fresh one.
reasons.sponsor_unreachable: Sponsor is not reachable. Check NAT / relay.
reasons.service_unavailable: Pairing service is unreachable. Try again later.
reasons.invalid_ciphertext: Backup record could not be decrypted. Restart the app to auto-resume.

globalRequest.warning: Make sure you initiated this pairing

discovery.description: Please ensure both devices are on the same local network

pinVerify.description: Please confirm if the PIN codes on both devices match

pinVerify.responderDescription: Compare this PIN with the one on {{deviceName}} and confirm the match on the initiating device.
pinVerify.warning: Please ensure both devices show the same PIN code

errors.activeSession: Another pairing session is already in progress
errors.noParticipant: No local device is ready to confirm pairing
errors.sessionExpired: The pairing session expired or was already closed
errors.daemonUnavailable: The pairing daemon is unavailable. Start the desktop service and try again

status.idle: Device {{name}} is requesting to connect to this device

modal.title: Send Feedback
modal.description: Your feedback helps us improve UniClipboard. Please describe your issue or suggestion below.
modal.error: Failed to send feedback. Please try again later.

previewPanel.title: Preview
previewPanel.empty: Hover over an item to preview

list.title: Sync status
list.historical: Created before sync tracking; no delivery records

button.entryDisabled: Already delivered to every paired device

notResendable.remoteOrigin: Entry {{entryIdShort}} originated on another device and cannot be resent from here.
notResendable.payloadLost: Entry {{entryIdShort}} is no longer available on this device.

error.noEligibleTargets: No eligible peers to resend to.

quickPanel.unavailable: Clipboard history is unavailable right now.

locked.title: Clipboard is locked
locked.description: Unlock to access your clipboard history

processingJoinSpace.title: Connecting to device…
processingJoinSpace.subtitle: A pairing request has been sent. Please wait for the other device to respond.
processingJoinSpace.hint: Go to the other device and approve the pairing request

common.encryptPassphrasePlaceholder: Enter the passphrase shown on the host device

brand.headline: Your clipboard, everywhere.
brand.tagline: End-to-end encrypted. Your keys never leave your devices.

welcome.title: Get started
welcome.subtitle: Choose how to set up this device.

create.title: Create a new secure space
create.description: Generate encryption keys and protect your clipboard data with your own passphrase.

join.title: Join an existing space
join.description: Pair with another device and reuse the passphrase to access the shared space.

import.divider: Already set up on another device?
import.title: Import from a backup
import.description: Move your space here from an exported config file.

welcome.footer: You can switch spaces or invite more devices later in Settings.

importConfig.title: Import configuration
importConfig.subtitle: Set up this device from a config file you exported on another device.
importConfig.confirmSubtitle: Review what you're importing, then confirm.
importConfig.passwordHint: Use the Space passphrase from the device this file was exported from - that's what unlocks it.
importConfig.note: This device will take over the exported device's identity and pairings. After importing, don't bring the original device back online - two devices sharing one identity will conflict on the device network.
importConfig.restartingDescription: Please wait - the app will restart and apply the imported config. Do not close it.
importConfig.restartingUnlockHint: After the restart you'll need your Space passphrase to unlock.

errors.invalidPassword: Wrong passphrase, or the file is corrupted
errors.incompatible: This config bundle's version is not compatible with the current app
errors.generic: Failed to import config. Please try again.

initializeSpace.title: Create your space
initializeSpace.subtitle: Set a name for this device and choose a passphrase to protect the encrypted space.

errors.alreadyInitialized: This device is already set up.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Daemon is not ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Failed to create the space. Please try again.

initializeSpace.hint: Save this passphrase somewhere safe — you'll need it on every device that joins this space.

showInvitation.title: Invite a new device
showInvitation.subtitle: Type this code on the joining device to add it to the space.
showInvitation.hint: Both devices must remain online while pairing.
showInvitation.hintExpired: The code is no longer valid. Cancel and start a new invitation.

redeemInvitation.title: Join an existing space
redeemInvitation.subtitle: Enter the invitation code shown on the other device, then provide the same passphrase used to create the space.

placeholders.passphrase: Enter the passphrase from the host device

errors.invitationNotFound: This invitation code has already been used or is no longer valid. Ask the host to issue a new one.
errors.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask the host to issue a new one.
errors.passphraseMismatch: The passphrase doesn't match. Try again.
errors.sponsorUnreachable: The host device is not reachable right now. Make sure both devices are online.
errors.sponsorRejected: The host did not recognise this code. Ask them to issue a new one.
errors.sponsorDeclined: The host declined the pairing request.
errors.timeout: The pairing handshake timed out. Please try again.
errors.connectionLost: The connection dropped mid-handshake. Please try again.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The daemon is not ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
errors.deviceNameRequired: This device needs a display name before it can join.
errors.generic: Could not join the space. Please try again.

redeemInvitation.hint: The code is short-lived — ask the host to keep it on screen until pairing completes.

sponsor.subtitle: Your space is ready. You can invite more devices later from the device list.

joiner.subtitle: You're now part of this encrypted space.
